entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal grain crop grown in the maize-wheat system

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A cereal grain crop grown in the maize-wheat system

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: IRRIGATION WATER PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of water use in irrigation, measured as WPi

entities.name: NITROGEN USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a plant utilizes nitrogen, measured as NUE

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The financial gain and economic viability of the agricultural system

entities.name: NET RETURNS
entities.description: The profit remaining after subtracting production costs

entities.name: SUBSURFACE DRIP IRRIGATION
entities.description: An irrigation system that delivers water directly to the root zone below the soil surface

entities.name: NITROGEN MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of optimizing the application and use of nitrogen fertilizer

entities.name: CONSERVATION AGRICULTURE
entities.description: A farming approach based on minimum soil disturbance, permanent soil organic cover, and crop rotations

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL FURROW/FLOOD IRRIGATION
entities.description: A traditional irrigation method where water is applied to the surface of the field

entities.name: MAIZE-WHEAT SYSTEM
entities.description: A cropping system involving the rotation of maize and wheat

entities.name: UNDERGROUND WATER DEPLETION
entities.description: The reduction of water levels in underground aquifers

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY OF AGRIFOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: The ability of food production systems to maintain productivity and environmental health over time

entities.name: NITROGEN FERTILIZER
entities.description: Nitrogen-based nutrients applied to crops to enhance growth

entities.name: TRANS-IGP OF SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: The Trans-Indo-Gangetic Plain region in South Asia
